S.FORM: I 1971 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 4 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joseph Kabila , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Congo, domocratic republic of the anini i ci Joseph Kabila, patirengan a romi'ad i 2001 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~us…ôpƒß kab~b~vi…æa , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~u≈ão~u, …¨~…Æo~umo~u ¶rati ¶ r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…æi ¶ o~uf tƒß…ô anini i ¶i *o~us…ôpƒß kab~b~vi…æa, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
S.FORM: I 1971 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 4 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joseph Kabila , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Congo, domocratic republic of the anini i ci Joseph Kabila, patirengan a romi'ad i 2001 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~us…ôpƒß kab~b~vi…æa , ma…æamiko~umo~u…¨~…Æaj a tam…¨~…Æaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~u≈ão~u, …¨~…Æo~umo~u ¶rati ¶ r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…æi ¶ o~uf tƒß…ô anini i ¶i *o~us…ôpƒß kab~b~vi…æa, patir…ô≈ãan a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ i **** a miƒß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ.
